summary:
The optimal study design involves a longitudinal approach to track fat content in breast milk from both pre-term and term infants over time, enabling detailed comparative analysis during developmental phases. \(\boxed{\text{Longitudinal}}\) To ensure accurate representation across different infant maturity levels, repeated measurements are crucial. ```markdown

To accurately compare fat content in expressed breast milk between preterm and term infants, a longitudinal study that tracks each group’s compositions over time provides essential insights into developmental differences. Thus, the most appropriate design is longitundinal.\(\boxed{\text{longitudinal}}\)

```
